user.description: Choose open-epg.com or a custom XMLTV URL (e.g. Humax guide served from /local/epg/).

data.ignore_timezone_offset: Ignore Timezone Offset (Fix for incorrect time shift)

custom_url.description: Enter a reachable XMLTV URL. For Humax: http://homeassistant.local:8123/local/epg/humax-epg.xml

data.ignore_timezone_offset: Ignore Timezone Offset (Fix for incorrect time shift)

open_epg.description: Enter the file name as displayed on the Open EPG website. Or specify a generated file code if applicable.

channels.description: Choose the channels you want to track from the available list below.

error.no_channels: No channels were found. Please verify the file name, generated code, or XMLTV URL and try again.
error.invalid_file_name: The file name appears to be invalid. Please double-check and try again. Visit the Open EPG website, click on 'Guides by Country', select your country, and enter the corresponding file name.
error.invalid_custom_url: Could not load channels from that URL. Check the XMLTV is reachable from Home Assistant and contains <channel> elements.

data.file_name: File Name (Or Generated File Code) do not change!
data.ignore_timezone_offset: Ignore Timezone Offset (Fix for incorrect time shift)

init.description: Update open-epg settings or the custom XMLTV URL.

channels.description: Choose the channels you want to track from the available list below.

error.no_channels: No channels were found. Please verify the file name, generated code, or XMLTV URL and try again.
error.invalid_custom_url: Could not load channels from that URL. Check the XMLTV is reachable from Home Assistant and contains <channel> elements.
